special-restsandbox: Title of Special:RestSandbox, also shown in the listing of special pages
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-text: Message shown at the top of Special:RestSandbox.
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-disc: Message shown on non-English wikis near the top of Special:RestSandbox.
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-sele: Message shown at the top of Special:RestSandbox, next to the selector for choosing an API.
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-no-s: Message shown on Special:RestSandbox when no API specs have been configured.

Message shown on Special:RestSandbox when an unknown API is requested. 

Parameters: $1 - The unknown API identifier
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-json: Message shown on Special:RestSandbox if the browser has JavaScript disabled.
